questions.question: Design a 2:1 multiplexer in Verilog and explain how it selects the input signal based on the select signals A and B. Include the input and output ports.
questions.hint: Use the correct Verilog syntax for the multiplexer and explain the logic behind its operation

questions.question: Write a Verilog code for a 3:1 multiplexer that selects one of three input signals based on the select signals A, B, and C. Explain how the multiplexer function works and include the input and output ports.
questions.hint: Use the correct Verilog syntax for the multiplexer and explain the logic behind its operation

questions.question: Design a 4:1 multiplexer in Verilog that selects one of four input signals based on the select signals A, B, C, and D. Explain how the multiplexer function works and include the input and output ports. Compare it with the 2:1 multiplexer.
questions.hint: Use the correct Verilog syntax for the multiplexer and explain the logic behind its operation
